title: Trimmier Trims
description: Adds nine new materials for armor trims
body:
# this isnt working, download with decreased expectations

Added nine new armor trim materials (maybe more coming soon???)

- Blaze Powder – Fiery accents for a fierce look.
- Breeze Rod – Cool tones inspired by gentle winds.
- Echo Shard – Echoes from ancient cities with mysterious flair.
- Ender Pearl – A shimmering, interdimensional touch.
- Magma Cream – Smooth, fiery detail for intense style.
- Nautilus Shell – Ocean-inspired elegance.
- Prismarine Shard – Aqua-hued accents with marine vibes.
- Shulker Shell – Unique boxy texture for added depth.
- Nether Wart – Deep crimson accents from the Nether’s flora.
